features: Pet Microfibre Towel Drying Super Absorbent for Cats or Dogs
Introducing our Pet Microfibre Towel, the ultimate drying solution for your beloved cats and dogs.

Crafted from a premium blend of 80% polyester and 20% nylon, this super absorbent towel is designed to quickly soak up moisture, ensuring your pet stays warm and dry after baths, rainy walks, or a day at the beach.
Measuring approximately 100cm x 50cm, it provides ample coverage for pets of all sizes, making it an essential addition to your pet care routine.
The quick-drying fabric not only saves you time but also helps prevent the growth of bacteria and odours, while its machine washable feature ensures easy maintenance and long-lasting use.
Treat your furry friend to the comfort they deserve with our Pet Microfibre Towel, and experience the convenience of a product that combines functionality with quality.
